subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with that serene, content and well-pleasing soul! This grievous calamity hath verily rent asunder the hearts of all... Every life must end in death, and every permanence is destined to extinction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منسوب بان نفس مطمئنه راضیه مرضیه این مصیبت هائله قلوب عموم را پرخون نمود... هر حیاتی را عاقبت موتی و هر بقائی را فنائی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @soul; spirit after death, @high station of the true believer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
